name: Coffee Express: Barista Simulator
short_description: Open your own coffee shop and become a barista in the cozy and colorful world of Coffee Express! A unique experience awaits you with stock tracking, realistic coffee making experience and shop customizations. Make your customers happy by making excellent coffee in your own coffee paradise!
detailed_description:
Step into the role of a barista and manage your very own coffee shop in Coffee Express, a first-person simulation game where every cup matters.

Prepare delicious drinks, satisfy your customers, and grow your café into the most beloved coffee spot in town. From grinding beans to crafting the perfect latte, every detail of the coffee-making process is in your hands.

Whether you're carefully following recipes or experimenting with your own style, Coffee Express offers a relaxing and immersive café experience.

  • Run Your Own Café

Manage your coffee shop, prepare drinks for customers, and build a reputation as the town’s favorite barista.

  • Realistic Coffee Preparation

Use authentic tools and machines such as espresso machines, portafilters, and coffee grinders to craft different types of coffee drinks.

  • Interactive Barista Gameplay

Every drink requires multiple steps and ingredients. Master the workflow and create the perfect cup every time.

  • Customer Requests and Creativity

Some customers may ask for something special, draw latte art, write funny messages on cups, or experiment with different combinations.

  • Different Types of Equipment

As time goes by, new equipment will find its place in your cafe. You will use not only coffee-making equipment, but also different types of equipment to run your cafe.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Turkish, Portuguese - Brazil
